pr_text:
## Title: Fix off-by-one array size error in PSBCH receiver

### Summary
The PSBCH receiver function `nr_rx_psbch()` was allocating three stack arrays with an incorrect size of `nb_re + 1` elements instead of `nb_re`. The variable `nb_re` represents the number of PSBCH data resource elements per OFDM symbol (`SL_NR_NUM_PSBCH_DATA_RE_IN_ONE_SYMBOL`). The receiver logic only accesses indices `0` through `nb_re - 1`, making the `+1` allocation unnecessary and wasteful. This off-by-one sizing could
